criteria: Public, non-archived, non-fork repositories that carry a core BCI/neuro topic, or a context topic plus a neuro keyword. Ranked by recency (from the 6-hour snapshot slot) and stars. Categorisation and evidence tiers are heuristic.

methodology.note: Inclusion is not endorsement; AxonOS is scored by the same formula as every project. Enriched signals (team, downloads, activity, funding channels) are real GitHub data; money-raised and legal domicile, when shown, are hand-curated and source-cited.

AxonOS-org.name: AxonOS
AxonOS-org.bio: A real-time Rust microkernel for safety-critical BCI. Deterministic EDF scheduling · Zero-copy signal path · Hardware-gated stimulation interlock.

AxonOS-BCI.name: Denis Yermakou
AxonOS-BCI.bio: Founder of AxonOS — a real-time Rust kernel for brain-computer interface systems. #![no_std] · Cortex-M · Singapore.

projects.description: The AxonOS Consent Protocol — specification and reference implementation. no_std, zero-alloc, forbid(unsafe): bounded CBOR codec, exhaustive consent state machine, StimGuard for brain–computer interfaces. All AxonOS.
projects.ecosystem_note: Wire protocol and reference implementation for neural device meshing.

projects.description: Hard real-time Rust microkernel for brain-computer interfaces. #![no_std] on Cortex-M, EDF scheduling with Kani-verified WCRT bounds, zero-copy intent path, capability-based privacy by construction. ABI v1 — tandem with axonos-sdk.
projects.ecosystem_note: Hard real-time scheduling core of the AxonOS neural operating system.
projects.curated_note: Open-source real-time neural OS for brain-computer interfaces.

projects.description: Kernel-level consent state machine for brain–computer interfaces — no_std, zero-alloc, #![forbid(unsafe_code)], formally bounded (Kani), with optional guardian co-authorisation.
projects.ecosystem_note: MMP Consent Extension: consent enforced at the connection layer.

projects.description: Deterministic, vector-pinned BCI signal pipeline for AxonOS: raw acquisition frame -> typed, consent-bound decision. no_std, zero-deps, unsafe-free, fixed-point. Engineering demonstrator, not a medical device.
projects.ecosystem_note: no_std deterministic EEG / neural signal processing pipeline.

projects.description: Canonical technical standard and architecture manual for AxonOS: deterministic BCI software, neural permissions, consent, validation, and governance.
projects.ecosystem_note: The AxonOS standard, conformance tiers and test vectors.

projects.description: AxonOS Radar — a living, auto-updated map of the open brain-computer-interface field. An AxonOS community project.
projects.ecosystem_note: The instrument you are looking at: a live map of the open BCI field.
